title: ligularia intermedia
intro: Ligularia intermedia, also known as the golden ray or Japanese ligularia, is a perennial plant species native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ligularia intermedia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
